Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core

Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio

package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.audio
Audio support for FlixelGDX.

This package provides Flixel style audio APIs on top of MiniAudio and libGDX integration. It includes playback objects, cached sources, and managers for controlling sound and music.

Key types:

  • Flixel.sound - Central audio manager used by game code.
  • FlixelSound - A playback object with volume, pan, pitch, fades, and completion signals.
  • FlixelSoundSource - A cached sound asset that can spawn fresh FlixelSound instances.

For loading, prefer Flixel.assets and the asset types in me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.asset.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx
    The core package of the FlixelGDX framework.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FlixelAudioManager
    Central manager for all audio: FlixelSound instances, master volume, sound groups (SFX and Music), and focus-based pause/resume.
    FlixelSound
    Flixel sound object that wraps an MASound from the miniaudio library.
    FlixelSoundSource
    Cached sound "source" (asset) that can spawn fresh FlixelSound instances on demand.
    FlixelSoundSourceLoader
    AssetManager loader that creates FlixelSoundSource instances from an asset key.
    FlixelSoundSourceLoader.FlixelSoundSourceParameter
